title: Can High Courts exempt convicts from surrender using inherent powers? Supreme Court refers issue to larger Bench
description: A three-judge Bench of the Supreme Court will decide whether High Courts can use their inherent powers under Section 482 of Code of Criminal Procedure (CrPC) [now Section 528 of Bharatiya Nagarik Suraksha Sanhita) to exempt convicts from surrendering before hearing revision petitions against conviction [Sudhir Khaitan v. State of Rajasthan & Ors.]. A Bench of Justices PS Narasimha and Alok Aradhe said conflicting rulings on the issue have created uncertainty in criminal p
